title: helichrysum wilmsii
intro: Helichrysum wilmsii, also known as mountain everlast, is a flowering plant species belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae) and native to South Africa. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Helichrysum wilmsii include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as supporting immune function and wound healing. Helichrysum wilmsii can be used in various herbal preparations, such as essential oils, teas, and tinctures, which can be applied topically or taken internally under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
